data.name: Bikini Island
data.detailed_description:
PRESENTATION


A plane full of international supermodels crashes in the sea. Only 3 of them survive and now they must learn the hard way how to exist in a dangerous and difficult world.

  • Pick 3 girls among 5 and see if you can resist a full week in this survival game mixing elements of RPG, management and simulation.
  • Fight off waves of monsters of increasing difficulty as you wait for the rescue squad to come for you.
  • Develop skills and capacities to help you on your survival: gardening, building, hunting and more.
  • Build your own camp and improve your house, garden, well and wall to help you in your adventure.

CONTENT


  • 21 events in total
  • 3 optional "unlimited" events
  • 4 Difficulty Modes
  • More than 100 different enemies
  • Topless and full nude girls with jiggling boobs
  • Free Instructions Manual available

INSTRUCTIONS MANUAL


Who ever said supermodels have no brain?



YOUR SUPERMODELS (from left to right)


LILY (UK)
PROTECTOR 10 LEADER 4 EXPLORER 2 FARMER 1
EVASION RATE 20% RECOVERY EFFECT 20% EXPERIENCE 5% CRITICAL RATE 5% NRG REGENERATION 1%
 Favorite Terrain: CAVE
 Favorite Weather: RAIN
 Special Traits: 50% resistant to Angry, 20% resistant to damage from Land enemies.

EVA (Russia)
EXPLORER 10 PROTECTOR 4 LEADER 2 BUILDER 1
CRITICAL EVASION 15% CRITICAL RATE 10% RECOVERY FROM FOOD 10% EXPERIENCE 5% NRG REGENERATION 2%
 Favorite Terrain: BEACH
 Favorite Weather: WIND
 Special Traits: 50% resistant to Paralyzed.

LISA (USA)
BUILDER 10 FARMER 4 PROTECTOR 2 LEADER 1
NRG CHARGE RATE 20% PHYSICAL COUNTER 15% TACTICAL COUNTER 10% TARGET RATE –10% EXPERIENCE 5%
 Favorite Terrain: LAND
 Favorite Weather: SUN
 Special Traits: 50% resistant to Burned, 20% resistant to damage from Armored enemies.

CHRISTY (China)
LEADER 10 BUILDER 4 FARMER 2 EXPLORER 1
TACTICAL COUNTER 10% RECOVERY EFFECT 10% EXPERIENCE 10% RECOVERY FROM FOOD 10%
 Favorite Terrain: NIGHT
 Favorite Weather: RAIN
 Special Traits: 50% resistant to Sleeping, 20% resistant to damage from Human enemies.

OLIVIA (Sweden)
FARMER 10 EXPLORER 4 BUILDER 2 PROTECTOR 1
PHYSICAL COUNTER 20% EVASION RATE 10% TACTICAL EVASION 10% NRG CHARGE RATE 10% CRITICAL RATE 5% EXPERIENCE 5%
 Favorite Terrain: SKY
 Favorite Weather: SUN

data.short_description: 3 hot supermodels must survive on a dangerous exotic island. Enough for the rescue squad to come for you? Pick 3 girls among 5 and see if you can resist a full week in this survival game mixing elements of RPG, management and simulation.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 128 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9.0 or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 9.0 Compatible Sound
